title: Tangy Egyptian Cheese Kebabs
description: A fermented and juicy Egyptian dish featuring cheese and ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients, perfect for adventurous eaters. This recipe combines the flavors of Egypt with a tangy twist.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Cut the domiati cheese into 1-inch cubes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cheese cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated cheese cubes onto skewers.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Serve the kebabs hot with additional lemon juice and olive oil if desired.
Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro.
Let the kebabs rest for a few minutes before serving.
